# InstallEnterpriseApplicationCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to install an enterprise app on a device.

## Declaration

```swift
object InstallEnterpriseApplicationCommand
```

## Objects

- **InstallEnterpriseApplicationCommand.Command**: The command to install an enterprise app on a device.

## Commands and responses

- **InstallEnterpriseApplicationResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to install an enterprise app on a device.
